item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly arbitrates between the long-term thesis and the immediate organizational action: it accepts that AI testing will likely improve and win in efficiency, but blocks the irreversible move of dissolving QA now. It downgrades the action to QA leverage/role transformation, preserves human result responsibility and quality gates, and gives staged trigger conditions such as multiple releases with acceptable discovery rate, false positives, missed defects, and maintenance cost. It does not merely agree or disagree and does not stack methods."}
